mapper.select:
SELECT A.WIR_NO, WIR_GG_NO, WIR_OWR_ID, WIR_WM_ID, WIR_WZ_NO,
/* 입고일시 표시용 기존에는 YYYY-MM-DD라서 일자만 보였음. 이제 운송업체가 요청 등록한 일시까지 보이도록 분까지 표시한다. */ TO_CHAR(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS WIR_IN_PLAN_DT,
WIR_STATUS_CD, WIR_WH_REPLY_STATUS_CD, WIR_INVOICE_NO, WIR_INVOICE_YMD, WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO, WIR_INCO_TERMS_CD, WIR_TRDR_NO, WIR_RQST_CN, WIR_OWR_NM, WIR_IO_SE_CD, TM.TM_ID, TM.TM_CP_NM, TM.TM_NAME, TM.TM_CP_TELNO, ( SELECT MAX(WIL.WIL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WI.WIL_CL_NO = WIL.WIL_NO WHERE WI.WI_GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS locationCode,
C.CC_NM AS wirStatusNm,
( SELECT MIN(GD.GOODS_NAME) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG JOIN GOODS GD ON CG.GOODS_NO = GD.GOODS_NO WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS firstItemName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS itemCnt,
( SELECT SUM(CG.CG_WEIGHT) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS wirWeight,
( SELECT SUM(CG.CG_QTY) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS wirPkgQty
FROM WH_IN_RPT A
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE C ON A.WIR_STATUS_CD = C.CC_CD AND C.CC_CCG_ID = 'WH_IN_STATUS'
LEFT JOIN TRAN_RCP T ON ( T.TRC_SE_CD = A.WIR_IO_SE_CD OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMP' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMPORT') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXP' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXPORT') ) AND ( T.TRC_NO = A.WIR_NO OR T.TRC_TFG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO )
LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_MANAGER TM ON TM.TM_NO = T.TRC_TM_NO
WHERE A.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId}
ORDER BY A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT DESC, A.WIR_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WH_IN_RPT A
WHERE 1=1 AND A.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId}
AND TRUNC(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT) <= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = #{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} OR (#{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} = 'IMPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMP') OR (#{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} = 'EXPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXP') )
AND A.WIR_STATUS_CD = #{searchDTO.wirStatusCd}
AND A.WIR_OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND A.WIR_INVOICE_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND A.WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.WIR_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_INVOICE_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, B.* FROM ( SELECT A.WIR_NO, WIR_GG_NO, WIR_OWR_ID, WIR_WM_ID, WIR_WZ_NO,
/* 입고일시 표시용 목록에서도 일자만 아니라 일시까지 보여준다. */ TO_CHAR(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS WIR_IN_PLAN_DT,
WIR_STATUS_CD, WIR_WH_REPLY_STATUS_CD, WIR_INVOICE_NO, WIR_INVOICE_YMD, WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO, WIR_INCO_TERMS_CD, WIR_TRDR_NO, WIR_RQST_CN, WIR_OWR_NM, WIR_IO_SE_CD, TM.TM_ID, TM.TM_CP_NM, TM.TM_NAME, TM.TM_CP_TELNO, ( SELECT MAX(WIL.WIL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WI.WIL_CL_NO = WIL.WIL_NO WHERE WI.WI_GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS locationCode,
C.CC_NM AS wirStatusNm,
( SELECT MIN(GD.GOODS_NAME) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG JOIN GOODS GD ON CG.GOODS_NO = GD.GOODS_NO WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS firstItemName,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS itemCnt,
( SELECT SUM(CG.CG_WEIGHT) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS wirWeight,
( SELECT SUM(CG.CG_QTY) FROM CUSTOMS_GOODS CG WHERE CG.GG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO ) AS wirPkgQty
FROM WH_IN_RPT A
LEFT JOIN COM_CODE C ON A.WIR_STATUS_CD = C.CC_CD AND C.CC_CCG_ID = 'WH_IN_STATUS'
LEFT JOIN TRAN_RCP T ON ( T.TRC_SE_CD = A.WIR_IO_SE_CD OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMP' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMPORT') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXP' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXPORT') ) AND ( T.TRC_NO = A.WIR_NO OR T.TRC_TFG_NO = A.WIR_GG_NO )
LEFT JOIN TRANSPORT_MANAGER TM ON TM.TM_NO = T.TRC_TM_NO
WHERE 1=1 AND A.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId}
AND TRUNC(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT) >= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT) <= TO_DATE(#{searchDTO.endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = #{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} OR (#{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} = 'IMPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMP') OR (#{searchDTO.wirIoSeCd} = 'EXPORT' AND A.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXP') )
AND A.WIR_STATUS_CD = #{searchDTO.wirStatusCd}
AND A.WIR_OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND A.WIR_INVOICE_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND A.WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%'
AND ( A.WIR_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_OWR_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_INVOICE_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' OR A.WIR_CARGO_MGMT_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchDTO.keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY A.WIR_IN_PLAN_DT DESC, A.WIR_NO DESC ) B WHERE ROWNUM <= #{searchDTO.endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{searchDTO.startRow}

SELECT CG.CG_NO AS "cgNo", CG.GOODS_NO AS "goodsNo", GD.GOODS_NAME AS "goodsName", CG.CG_QTY AS "cgQty", CG.CG_WEIGHT AS "cgWeight", CG.CG_ORIGIN AS "cgOrigin", WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO AS "wzNo", WI.WIL_CL_NO AS "locationCode",
/* * Y: 현재 보관중 * N: 반출완료 * NULL: 아직 위치 배정 전 */ WI.WI_USE_YN AS "wiUseYn",
CASE WHEN WI.WI_USE_YN = 'Y' THEN '현재 보관중' WHEN WI.WI_USE_YN = 'N' THEN '반출완료 위치' ELSE '위치 미배정' END AS "locationStatusNm"
FROM WH_IN_RPT WIR
JOIN CUSTOMS_GOODS CG ON WIR.WIR_GG_NO = CG.GG_NO
JOIN GOODS GD ON CG.GOODS_NO = GD.GOODS_NO
LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI ON WI.WI_WIR_NO = WIR.WIR_NO AND WI.WI_GG_NO = CG.GG_NO AND WI.WI_CG_NO = CG.CG_NO LEFT JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO
WHERE WIR.WIR_NO = #{wirNo} AND WIR.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId}
ORDER BY CG.CG_NO

SELECT location_code AS "locationCode", display_code AS "displayCode" FROM ( SELECT /* location_code = DB에 실제 저장할 전역 유일 위치번호
형식: WH-016-A-01-01-01
의미: WH-016 = 창고번호 A = 구역 01 = 줄 번호, 앞뒤 방향 01 = 칸 번호, 좌우 방향 01 = 층 번호, 위아래 방향 */ WZ.WZ_WH_NO || '-' || CASE WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'A%' THEN 'A' WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'B%' THEN 'B' WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'C%' THEN 'C' ELSE 'Z' END || '-' || LPAD(r.row_no, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(b.bay_no, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(l.level_no, 2, '0') AS location_code,
/* display_code = 화면 드롭다운에 보여줄 위치번호
지금은 화면에서도 전체 위치번호를 보여주기로 했으니까 location_code와 같은 형식으로 만들었다. */ WZ.WZ_WH_NO || '-' || CASE WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'A%' THEN 'A' WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'B%' THEN 'B' WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'C%' THEN 'C' ELSE 'Z' END || '-' || LPAD(r.row_no, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(b.bay_no, 2, '0') || '-' || LPAD(l.level_no, 2, '0') AS display_code
FROM WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ
/* row_no = 줄 번호
일단 최대 범위인 1번 줄부터 7번 줄까지 만든다. 실제 사용 가능 범위는 아래 WHERE 조건에서 구역별로 제한한다.
A구역: 1~7 B구역: 1~3 C구역: 1~5 */ CROSS JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS row_no FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) r
/* bay_no = 칸 번호
일단 최대 범위인 1번 칸부터 16번 칸까지 만든다. 실제 사용 가능 범위는 아래 WHERE 조건에서 구역별로 제한한다.
A구역: 1~16 B구역: 1~9 C구역: 1~12 */ CROSS JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS bay_no FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 16 ) b
/* level_no = 층 번호
일단 최대 범위인 1층부터 4층까지 만든다. 실제 사용 가능 범위는 아래 WHERE 조건에서 구역별로 제한한다.
A구역: 1~4 B구역: 1~3 C구역: 1~4 */ CROSS JOIN ( SELECT LEVEL AS level_no FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 4 ) l
WHERE WZ.WZ_NO = #{zone} AND WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId}
/* React 3D 랙 구조 기준으로 구역별 위치 범위를 제한한다.
A구역: row 1~7, bay 1~16, level 1~4 B구역: row 1~3, bay 1~9, level 1~3 C구역: row 1~5, bay 1~12, level 1~4
이 조건이 없으면 B구역에서도 WH-016-B-01-05-04 같은 실제 3D 랙에 없는 위치가 드롭다운 후보로 내려간다. */ AND r.row_no <= CASE WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'A%' THEN 7 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'B%' THEN 3 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'C%' THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
AND b.bay_no <= CASE WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'A%' THEN 16 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'B%' THEN 9 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'C%' THEN 12 ELSE 0 END
AND l.level_no <= CASE WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'A%' THEN 4 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'B%' THEN 3 WHEN WZ.WZ_NM LIKE 'C%' THEN 4 ELSE 0 END ) WHERE location_code NOT IN ( SELECT WI.WIL_CL_NO FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO WHERE WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = #{zone} AND NVL(WI.WI_USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL ) ORDER BY location_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION ( WIL_NO, WIL_WH_ZONE_NO, WIL_IN_DT, WIL_DESC_CN, WIL_REGIST_DT ) SELECT #{goods.locationCode}, #{goods.wzNo}, SYSDATE, #{goods.goodsName} || ' 배치 위치', SYSDATE FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WHERE WIL_NO = #{goods.locationCode} )

INSERT INTO WAREHOUSE_ITEM ( WI_NO, WI_WIR_NO, WI_GG_NO, WIL_CL_NO, WI_CG_NO, WI_TY_CD, WI_STATUS_CD, WI_SEAL_NO, WI_DESC_CN, WI_USE_YN, WI_REGIST_DT, WI_UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( SEQ_WAREHOUSE_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{whInRptDTO.wirNo}, #{whInRptDTO.wirGgNo}, #{goods.locationCode}, #{goods.cgNo}, 'GENERAL', 'IN_DONE', NULL, #{goods.goodsName} || ' / 위치: ' || #{goods.locationCode}, 'Y', SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT WH.WH_NO AS "whNo", WH.WH_NM AS "whNm",
WZ.WZ_NO AS "wzNo", WZ.WZ_WH_NO AS "wzWhNo", WZ.WM_ID AS "wmId", WZ.WZ_NM AS "wzNm", WZ.WZ_TY_CD AS "wzTyCd", WZ.WZ_STATUS_CD AS "wzStatusCd", WZ.WZ_LOAD_PSBL_YN AS "wzLoadPsblYn", WZ.WZ_TTL_CAPA AS "wzTtlCapa", WZ.WZ_USE_CAPA AS "wzUseCapa", WZ.WZ_USE_RT AS "wzUseRt", WZ.WZ_DESC_CN AS "wzDescCn", WZ.WZ_USE_YN AS "wzUseYn", WZ.WZ_REGIST_DT AS "wzRegistDt", WZ.WZ_UPDT_DT AS "wzUpdtDt"
FROM WAREHOUSE WH JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WH.WH_NO = WZ.WZ_WH_NO
WHERE WH.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WZ.WZ_USE_YN = 'Y' AND WZ.WZ_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE'
ORDER BY WZ.WZ_NO

SELECT MAX(TM.TM_ID) FROM WH_IN_RPT W JOIN TRAN_RCP T ON ( T.TRC_SE_CD = W.WIR_IO_SE_CD OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMPORT' AND W.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXPORT' AND W.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXP') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'IMP' AND W.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'IMPORT') OR (T.TRC_SE_CD = 'EXP' AND W.WIR_IO_SE_CD = 'EXPORT') ) AND ( T.TRC_NO = W.WIR_NO OR T.TRC_TFG_NO = W.WIR_GG_NO ) JOIN TRANSPORT_MANAGER TM ON TM.TM_NO = T.TRC_TM_NO WHERE W.WIR_NO = #{wirNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'SR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD( NVL( MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(SR_NO, 13))), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM SUPP_RQST WHERE SR_NO LIKE 'SR-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-%'
INSERT INTO SUPP_RQST ( SR_NO, SR_REF_BIZ_CD, SR_REF_NO, SENDER_ID, SENDER_TY_CD, RECEIVER_ID, RECEIVER_TY_CD, SR_STATUS_CD, SR_REQ_DT, SR_REQ_CN ) VALUES ( #{srNo}, #{srRefBizCd}, #{srRefNo}, #{senderId}, #{senderTyCd}, #{receiverId}, #{receiverTyCd}, 'REQ', SYSDATE, #{srReqCn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE WH_IN_RPT SET WIR_STATUS_CD = 'REQ_FIX', WIR_WH_REPLY_STATUS_CD = 'REQ_FIX' WHERE WIR_NO = #{srRefNo} AND WIR_WM_ID = #{senderId} AND WIR_STATUS_CD = 'WAIT'
UPDATE SUPP_RQST SET SR_STATUS_CD = 'APR', SR_APPR_DT = SYSDATE WHERE SR_REF_BIZ_CD = 'WH_IN_RPT' AND SR_REF_NO = #{wirNo} AND SR_STATUS_CD = 'SUB'

UPDATE WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ SET WZ.WZ_USE_CAPA = ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT WI.WIL_CL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO WHERE WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = WZ.WZ_NO AND NVL(WI.WI_USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL ), WZ.WZ_USE_RT = ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT WI.WIL_CL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO WHERE WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO = WZ.WZ_NO AND NVL(WI.WI_USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL ) / NULLIF(WZ.WZ_TTL_CAPA, 0) * 100, 2 ), WZ.WZ_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE WHERE WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WZ.WZ_NO IN ( SELECT DISTINCT WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO INNER JOIN WH_IN_RPT WIR ON WIR.WIR_NO = WI.WI_WIR_NO WHERE WI.WI_WIR_NO = #{wirNo} AND WIR.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL )

UPDATE WAREHOUSE WH SET WH.WH_TTL_CAPA = ( SELECT NVL(SUM(WZ.WZ_TTL_CAPA), 0) FROM WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ WHERE WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO AND WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WZ.WZ_USE_YN = 'Y' AND WZ.WZ_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' ), WH.WH_USE_CAPA = ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT WI.WIL_CL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO WHERE WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO AND WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND NVL(WI.WI_USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL ), WH.WH_USE_RT = ROUND( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT WI.WIL_CL_NO) FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO WHERE WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO AND WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND NVL(WI.WI_USE_YN, 'Y') = 'Y' AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT NVL(SUM(WZ.WZ_TTL_CAPA), 0) FROM WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ WHERE WZ.WZ_WH_NO = WH.WH_NO AND WZ.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WZ.WZ_USE_YN = 'Y' AND WZ.WZ_STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' ), 0 ) * 100, 2 ), WH.WH_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE WHERE WH.WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WH.WH_NO IN ( SELECT DISTINCT WZ.WZ_WH_NO FROM WAREHOUSE_ITEM WI INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ITEM_LOCATION WIL ON WIL.WIL_NO = WI.WIL_CL_NO INNER JOIN WAREHOUSE_ZONE WZ ON WZ.WZ_NO = WIL.WIL_WH_ZONE_NO INNER JOIN WH_IN_RPT WIR ON WIR.WIR_NO = WI.WI_WIR_NO WHERE WI.WI_WIR_NO = #{wirNo} AND WIR.WIR_WM_ID = #{wmId} AND WI.WIL_CL_NO IS NOT NULL )
